SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 NotificationRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationRepository
public class NotificationRepository extends Object
Repository class responsible for managing Notification data in Firebase Firestore for the SyntaxEvents application.

Handles writing notifications and notification logs to Firestore. Does not contain any role-based or UI logic — that belongs in the fragment.

  • 嵌套类概要

    说明

    NotificationRepository.NotificationCallback
    Callback interface for success notification
    static interface

    Callback interface for notification list

  • 方法详细资料

    • sendNotification

      public void sendNotification(Notification notification, String eventId, List<String> targetGroups, NotificationRepository.NotificationCallback callback)
      Writes a Notification document to Firestore and stores its generated ID back onto the object.
      参数:
      notification - the notification to store
      callback - success or failure

    • getNotificationsForUser

      public void getNotificationsForUser(String userId, NotificationRepository.NotificationListCallback callback)
      Get the notification of a user from the firebase
      参数:
      userId - the id of user
      callback - the callback of notifications

    • getAllNotifications

      public void getAllNotifications(NotificationRepository.NotificationListCallback callback)
      Get all the notifications in firebase
      参数:
      callback - callback of all notifications
